flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Concorde Career College-Aurora fell 67% between 2021 and 2024 (781 → 256).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Concorde Career College-Aurora fell 12% between 2009 and 2010 (78.8% → 69.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Concorde Career College-Aurora fell 11% between 2022 and 2024 (71.7% → 63.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Concorde Career College-Aurora fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).
